revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 4 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月4日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 4일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 4 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初四]][[zh:十二月初四]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 4|qq=December 4}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 4일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 4''' is the 4th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1017|en|1017|qid=Q19249|lt=1017|1=1017}} {{ill|December 24|en|December 24|qid=Q2705|lt=December 24|1=December 24}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}} was appointed as {{ill|Daijō-daijin|en|Daijō-daijin|qid=Q1157586|lt=Daijō-daijin|1=Daijō-daijin}}. * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-daijin|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 4th year – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|en|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|qid=Q1041434|lt=Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|1=Matsudaira Kiyoyasu}} (the grandfather of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}}) was executed at Owari Province (尾張国) at a location known as the “{{ill|Moriyama Kuzure|ja|森山崩れ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Kuzure|1=Moriyama Kuzure|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5364397}}.” * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} established a {{ill|Yōjōsho|ja|養生所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yōjōsho|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} within the Koishikawa Yakuin area of Edo. * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|January 14|en|January 14|qid=Q2257|lt=January 14|1=January 14}}) – The interpreter for the U.S. Consul, {{ill|Townsend Harris|1=Townsend Harris|2=ja|3=タウンゼント・ハリス|ja|タウンゼンド・ハリス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Townsend Harris|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タウンゼント・ハリス|1=Townsend Harris|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q610626}}, named {{ill|Henry Heusken|en|Henry Heusken|qid=Q3132832|lt=Henry Huesken|1=Henry Heusken}}, was attacked by a samurai from the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}} and died the following day. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kōdō (Tang)|ja|弘道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōdō (Tang)|1=Q11487375|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11487375}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|683|en|683|qid=Q33496|lt=683|1=683}} {{ill|December 27|en|December 27|qid=Q2800|lt=December 27|1=December 27}}) – {{ill|高宗|en|高宗|qid=Q16799600|lt=Gao Zong (Tang)|1=高宗}}, the 3rd Emperor of the Tang Dynasty (born {{ill|628|en|628|qid=Q30592|lt=628|1=628}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|qid=Q1183728|lt=Gangyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|881|en|881|qid=Q30382|lt=881|1=881}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|qid=Q2228|lt=January 7|1=January 7}}) – {{ill|Emperor Seiwa|en|Emperor Seiwa|qid=Q349243|lt=Emperor Seiwa|1=Emperor Seiwa}} (the 56th Emperor of Japan) (born {{ill|850|en|850|qid=Q30364|lt=850|1=850}}). * {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|qid=Q1194155|lt=Manju|1=Manju (era)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1028|en|1028|qid=Q19273|lt=1028|1=1028}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinaga|en|Fujiwara no Michinaga|qid=Q433133|lt=Fujiwara no Michinaga|1=Fujiwara no Michinaga}}, the regent for {{ill|Emperor Go-Ichijō|en|Emperor Go-Ichijō|qid=Q374087|lt=Go-Ichijō Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Ichijō}} (born {{ill|966|en|966|qid=Q23743|lt=966|1=966}}). * Manju 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1028, {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yukinari|en|Fujiwara no Yukinari|qid=Q3076818|lt=Fujiwara Yukinari|1=Fujiwara no Yukinari}}, a calligrapher (born {{ill|972|en|972|qid=Q23575|lt=972|1=972}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|3|12|5|11|4|1|12|1204|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
